svg.title: Aaditya Padiya — System Administrator, Cloud & AI Infrastructure Engineer
svg.desc: Animated light-theme profile banner for Aaditya Padiya: an ASCII-art avatar inside a glass terminal, with typing name animation, rotating role titles, profile details (Pune India, BCA IT, 3+ years experience, CludoBits IT Solutions), animated skill pills and social links for GitHub, LinkedIn, portfolio and email.
